title: Google reveals why it is slashing 15GB of free Google Drive storage down to 5GB for new users
snippet: Google has updated its account storage policy, offering new users only 5GB of Google Drive storage unless they add a phone number. The company has now finally broken its silence on the new changes.

title: OnePlus suddenly pauses latest OxygenOS 16 update: here's what happened
snippet: OnePlus has suspended OxygenOS 16.0.7.XXX and 16.0.5.XXX updates due to issues causing abnormal restarts for some users. The company says it is investigating the problems and plans to resume the rollout once resolved

title: Xiaomi 17 Max launching soon: 200MP LEICA camera, 8,000mAh battery and LTPO AMOLED display confirmed
snippet: Xiaomi will be launching the Xiaomi 17 Max in China soon, The flagship phone will features an 8,000mAh battery, 100W fast charging, a 6.9-inch 2K display, and a LEICA powered camera setup with a 200MP primary shooter.&nbsp;

title: Intel begins iPhone and Mac chip production as Apple explores TSMC alternative: Report
snippet: Apple has begun producing low-end processors for its devices at Intel's foundries, marking a shift from TSMC. Analyst Ming-Chi Kuo reports that 80% of these chips are for iPhones, with production ramp-up expected by 2027

title: Windows 11 will soon detect and automatically uninstall faulty driver updates before they crash your PC
snippet: Microsoft is introducing Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery to automatically remove faulty drivers from Windows systems. The feature allows Windows to automatically roll back problematic drivers to stable versions&nbsp;

title: Google's new Gemini Intelligence's ‘advanced’ spec requirements may even exclude older Pixel and Samsung flagships
snippet: The lack of an official compatibility list for Gemini Intelligence has raised concerns over which devices will support the new AI features. A new developer page has suggested even older Google and Samsung flagships may not get the AI features

title: AI job takeover fears rise: 10 human skills that machines may still struggle to replace
snippet: As AI reshapes workplaces across industries, some human abilities may remain difficult to automate. From emotional intelligence and creativity to leadership and ethical decision-making, here are 10 skills that could stay valuable in an AI-driven future.

title: What is Weights.gg? OpenAI quietly acquired a startup famous for AI deepfake voices
snippet: OpenAI has acquired Weights.gg, a startup focused on AI voice replication tools. The startup ceased operations in March and its employees have now reportedly been dispersed inside OpenAI.

title: You can now connect bank accounts, track spending and ask personal finance questions to ChatGPT
snippet: OpenAI has introduced a Personal Finance feature in ChatGPT which allows users to link their financial accounts and analyze spending habits.&nbsp;

title: TSMC's Japan unit fab swings to profit in Q1
snippet: The subsidiary of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (TSMC) in Kumamoto, Japan, turned a profit in the first quarter of this year, marking the first time the first fab of the unit become profitable since mass production started at the end of 2024, according to a report by Focus Taiwan.

title: Marc Andreessen posts boardroom spoof video taking aim at General Catalyst ad
snippet: Venture capitalist Marc Andreessen escalated a public spat with General Catalyst by posting a video mocking their viral ad for a fictional "Woof AI" product. Andreessen criticized the ad as condescending, sparking debate among industry professionals about the tone and message of the campaign.

title: The world is on track to miss its health targets
snippet: Every year the World Health Organization publishes a global health statistics report. It features the numbers behind world health trends and, importantly, assesses whether we’re on track to reach ambitious goals set in 2015. It’s a bit like a health grade. The 2026 report was published on Wednesday.

title: The shock of seeing your body used in deepfake porn
